channel.title: mycatalog updates
channel.description: 'My Catalog' uses the IBM Cloud catalog API to retrieve data from the catalog. It attempts to be as accurate as possible. This feed shows additions, updates, removals from the catalog. Use with care. It is a work-in-progress :)

item.title: [updated] OpenPages (openpages) has a new plan named saastrial
item.description:
To access the trial instance, users must navigate to the "watsonx.governance - OpenPages Beta" on their IBM cloud account. In the resource list page, select the instance named "watsonx.governance trial instance".
Trial plan services are limited for a 14-day period.
As this is a shared instance, customers must not upload confidential or proprietary data.
